parts.text: ow is mia khalifa

Mia Khalifa is a popular former adult film actress from Lebanon who was born on May 10, 1993. She gained fame in the adult industry after joining in 2014 and retired from it in 2018. She currently works as a webcam model, host, and social media personality.
who is ellie nova
Ellie Nova is a popular American adult film actress who was born on June 4, 1996. She started her career in the adult industry in 2015 and has since gained fame for her work as an actress and model.
